hooks.description: Inject project stack reminder at session start
hooks.command: echo 'Stack: Next.js 16 + Firebase + pnpm workspaces. Always use pnpm. Check frontend/CLAUDE.md and backend/CLAUDE.md for package-specific rules. See docs/DESIGN.md for UI conventions.'

case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.ts|*.tsx) PKGDIR=$(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -oE '^.*(frontend|backend)/') && [ -n "$PKGDIR" ] && cd "$PKGDIR" && npx eslint --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 | grep -E '(error|warning)' || true ;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.json|*.css|*.md) npx --yes prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.tf) terraform fmt "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac

hooks.description: Block `any` type usage in TypeScript (including any[], Promise<any>, Record<string, any>)
hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.ts|*.tsx) if grep -qE ': any\b|as any\b|<any[,>\[]' "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not use `any`. Use a proper type or `unknown` with narrowing. This includes any[], Promise<any>, Record<string,any>.' >&2; exit 2; fi ;; esac

hooks.description: Block NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix on server-only secrets
hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.env*) if grep -qiE 'NEXT_PUBLIC_.*(service.?account|admin|secret|private.?key)' "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'BLOCKED: Never use NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix on service account keys or admin secrets. These are server-only.' >&2; exit 2; fi ;; esac

case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.env.local|*.env.development|*.env.production|*.env.staging) echo 'BLOCKED: Only .env.example (committed) and .env/.env.local (gitignored) are allowed. Never create environment-specific committed env files.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac

case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *lib/firebase/admin.ts) if grep -q 'use client' "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'BLOCKED: firebase/admin.ts is server-only. It must never have "use client".' >&2; exit 2; fi ;; esac

hooks.description: Block relative imports beyond one level in frontend
hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */frontend/src/*.ts|*/frontend/src/*.tsx) if grep -qE "from '\.\./\.\./" "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not use relative paths more than one level deep. Use the @/ alias instead.' >&2; exit 2; fi ;; esac

hooks.description: TypeScript typecheck after frontend source changes
hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'frontend/src/'; then cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -5 | grep -q 'error' && { echo 'TYPECHECK FAILED:' >&2; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep 'error TS' | head -10 >&2; exit 2; } || true; fi

hooks.description: TypeScript typecheck after backend source changes
hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'backend/src/'; then cd backend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -5 | grep -q 'error' && { echo 'TYPECHECK FAILED:' >&2; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep 'error TS' | head -10 >&2; exit 2; } || true; fi

hooks.description: Block direct pushes to main or develop
hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_COMMAND" in *'git push'*) if echo "$CLAUDE_COMMAND" | grep -qE 'origin (main|develop)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not push directly to main or develop. Create a feature branch and open a PR.' >&2; exit 2; fi ;; esac

hooks.description: Block firebase deploy without explicit approval
hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_COMMAND" | grep -qE 'firebase deploy'; then echo 'BLOCKED: `firebase deploy` deploys to production. This requires explicit user approval — do not run automatically.' >&2; exit 2; fi

hooks.description: Block force push and hook bypass flags
hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_COMMAND" in *'--force'*|*'-f origin'*|*'--no-verify'*) echo 'BLOCKED: --force push and --no-verify are not allowed in this project.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac

hooks.description: Audit all modified TS/TSX source files for console.log statements
hooks.command: DIRTY=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx)$' | grep -E 'src/' | xargs grep -l 'console\.log' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$DIRTY" ]; then echo "WARNING: console.log found in modified files — remove before committing:"; echo "$DIRTY"; fi; true
